steps.assistant_text: 9-insn unaligned-big-endian-load fragment using uninitialized $t2/$t5 from caller (non-standard calling convention with caller pre-loading scratch regs). Modifies caller's stack frame at sp+0x4 and consumes caller's 0x8-byte stack adjustment. Documented as 'NOT matchable from C without inline-asm.' 5th application of PREFIX_BYTES + INSN_PATCH combo: empty void emits jr_ra+nop; PREFIX injects 7 leading reg-only/sp-rel insns (or t6,t2,t5; sw; lbu; andi; or; sw; addiu sp,+0x8); INSN_PATCH \@0x20 overwrites trailing nop with  for return value. All leading insns are reg-only or sp/a0-imm — zero relocations needed.
